app.name: MyEco
app.tagline: Take control of your personal finances

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accounts.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. The account and all its transactions will be permanently deleted.
accounts.currencyWarningDesc: This account has transactions. The balance will be recalculated by converting past transactions to the new currency using current exchange rates. Old transactions keep their original currency in the list.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
transactions.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. The transaction will be permanently deleted.
transactions.recurringInfo: A copy will be created automatically according to the selected interval.

goals.title: Savings Goals
goals.remainingToGoal: You need {{amount}} more to reach your goal
goals.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
goals.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All progress will be lost.

debts.title: Debts
debts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this debt?
debts.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All payment records will be lost.

reports.title: Reports
reports.clickBarHint: Click on a bar or slice to see details

welcome.title: Welcome to MyEco!
welcome.description: We'll guide you through the main sections so you can start taking control of your personal finances.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Here you'll see a summary of your net worth, monthly income and expenses, and your most recent transactions.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Register all your accounts: cash, checking, credit cards, savings, and investments. Keep track of each one.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Record your income, expenses, and transfers. You can search, filter, and organize everything.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.description: Set monthly spending limits by category. MyEco will show your progress and alert you if you overspend.

goals.title: Savings Goals
goals.description: Set savings goals with target dates. Track your progress with visual bars and celebrate when you achieve them.

debts.title: Debts
debts.description: Track what you owe and what others owe you. Keep records of payments, installments, and interest.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: View interactive charts of your finances: monthly trends, spending by category, and more. Export to Excel or CSV.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize your experience: change the language, default currency, and manage your categories.

final.title: You're all set!
final.description: Now you know the basics. Start by adding your accounts and transactions. Remember, all your data is stored locally on your device. Enjoy MyEco!

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetTourDesc: Show the welcome tour again on next app launch
settings.tourResetSuccess: Tour reset. It will appear on your next visit.
settings.exchangeRatesDesc: Configure conversion rates between currencies to view all balances in your default currency
settings.rateDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this exchange rate?
settings.rateDuplicate: A rate for this currency pair already exists
settings.rateOutdatedDesc: Rates are older than 24 hours. Would you like to update them?
settings.rateDropDetected: Rate dropped {{percent}}% in the last 30 days!
settings.rateNoHistory: No history available. Fetch rates regularly to see trends.
settings.notificationsDesc: Receive payment reminders, budget alerts, and goal achievements
settings.notificationsUnavailable: Notifications not available in this browser
settings.resetDataDesc:
This will permanently delete ALL your data (accounts, transactions, budgets, goals, debts) and reset the app to its initial state. This action cannot be undone.

Categories will be restored to defaults.

welcome.title: Your money, smarter
welcome.subtitle: Track your income, expenses and personal finances simply and elegantly. Everything is stored locally on your device.
welcome.biometric: Biometrics available - your data never leaves your device
welcome.offlineNote: MyEco works 100% offline. All your data is stored locally on your device.
welcome.demoLoadedDesc: Explore MyEco with sample accounts, transactions, and budgets. You can edit or delete them anytime.
welcome.notifEnabled: Notifications enabled - you will receive payment reminders and alerts

offline.dataSafe: Your data is safe - MyEco works offline

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

profile.title: Profile
profile.userNameDesc: This name will be shown in the sidebar

security.title: Security
security.pinLockDesc: Protect your data with a numeric PIN code
security.pinTooShort: PIN must be at least {{digits}} digits
security.biometricDesc: Use fingerprint or face to unlock the app
security.biometricNotAvailable: Biometric not available on this device
security.securityQuestionsDesc: Set up security questions to recover your PIN if you forget it
security.atLeastOneQuestion: Please set up at least one question with an answer
security.securityQuestionsNote: Answers are case-insensitive and hashed before storage. You will need these to recover your PIN if you forget it.
security.qPet: What is the name of your first pet?
security.qCity: What city were you born in?
security.qMother: What is your mother's maiden name?
security.qSchool: What was the name of your first school?
security.qFriend: What is the name of your best childhood friend?
security.answerTooShort: Answer must be at least 2 characters

lockScreen.title: MyEco
lockScreen.subtitle: Enter your PIN to unlock
lockScreen.recoveryDesc: Answer your security questions to reset the PIN
lockScreen.recoveryWarning: If your answers are correct, the PIN will be removed. You can set a new one in Settings.
lockScreen.recoverySuccessDesc: Your PIN has been removed. Go to Settings to set a new one.

pwaInstall.title: Install MyEco
pwaInstall.description: Install this app on your device for a better experience
pwaInstall.installedDesc: The app has been added to your device. You can open it from your home screen.
pwaInstall.welcomeBackDesc: MyEco is ready to use. All your data is right here.
pwaInstall.offlineReadyDesc: MyEco now works without internet connection

validation.positiveAmount: Amount must be greater than zero
validation.invalidName: Name must be at least 1 character

fiftyThirtyTwenty.budgetRuleDesc: Allocate 50% to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings
fiftyThirtyTwenty.savingsOnTrack: Savings are at or above 20% of income

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Press a key to navigate quickly
shortcuts.tip: Shortcuts don't work when typing in input fields.
